patches.hypothesis: The refined fix addresses the root cause of the bug by using a more robust approach to handle different JSON token types, adding more test cases to cover edge cases and general cases, and refactoring the _deserialize() method to handle different types of JSON tokens.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug was caused by an incorrect type cast in the method _deserialize(). The method was expecting a JsonToken.START_OBJECT but the actual JSON token was JsonToken.FIELD_NAME.
